title: Yacht Life Glamour
promptText: luxury lifestyle portrait of an Indian woman on a yacht, [same 100% identical face uploaded], [SKIN_TONE: Golden hour glow], wearing [BIKINI_STYLE: elegant black monokini with cutouts], [LOCATION: Deck of a private superyacht in the Mediterranean], [ACTION: Lounging on a sunpad, holding a glass of champagne, wind in hair], [EMOTION: Living the best life, wealthy, carefree], [LIGHTING: Warm golden sunset light], [BACKGROUND: Deep blue sea and distant coastline], brand embedding "GetAiPrompt.in" on a nearby towel, 8K, billionaire lifestyle vibe, --ar 9:16.
